Textrude 1.7.1+36.Branch.main.Sha.c409c4d48aae12d7fd15a574080cad0160a837a4
Copyright (C) 2026 Textrude

  render            

  renderFromFile    performs a render but takes the argument list from a yaml or
                    json file

  pipe              Performs a render by applying a template to stdin then
                    writing to stdout

  info              Provide detail information about version and further
                    resources

  iFilter           Performs a filter operation on structured data

  iDo               Runs operation for each item in the input

  iMapStr           Maps each item in the input to a new string

  iMapObj           Maps each item in the input (accessible as 'i') to a new
                    object

  mDo               Run an arbitrary expression that the model has been piped
                    into

  Do                Run an arbitrary expression.  Model is accessible as 'm'

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

  version           Display version information.

Copyright (C) 2026 Textrude

  render            

  renderFromFile    performs a render but takes the argument list from a yaml or
                    json file

  pipe              Performs a render by applying a template to stdin then
                    writing to stdout

  info              Provide detail information about version and further
                    resources

  iFilter           Performs a filter operation on structured data

  iDo               Runs operation for each item in the input

  iMapStr           Maps each item in the input to a new string

  iMapObj           Maps each item in the input (accessible as 'i') to a new
                    object

  mDo               Run an arbitrary expression that the model has been piped
                    into

  Do                Run an arbitrary expression.  Model is accessible as 'm'

  help              Display more information on a specific command.

  version           Display version information.
